pressure_statement: A previously archived frame keeps matching new failures, but it never received a clean wound under the current receipt regime.

lens.name: ghost_seed_under_new_pressure
lens.distortion_risk: May let a familiar ghost feel wiser than the new evidence warrants.

likely_false_positives: shared language mistaken for shared mechanism
likely_false_negatives: a useful ghost rejected because it failed under an older representation
lens_debt.overuse_failure_mode: Archived ideas sneak back into governance by familiarity.

candidate_claim_or_frame: The archived frame may still be useful as a search lens if it is reintroduced only through new receipts and new wounds.
mechanism: If useful, the ghost should predict a new probe outcome that was not available when it was archived.

rivals.frame: The ghost is only a recurring metaphor with no new mechanism.
The new pressure is better explained by a fresh lens.

first_wound.smallest_test: Run one new receipt-backed probe the archived frame did not previously face.
first_wound.what_would_hurt: The ghost fails to predict anything different from the fresh counter-lens.

attention_request.reason: The ghost may seed one cheap probe, but it cannot govern without new receipts.

promotion_requirements: At least one rival is present.
New receipts exist for ghost reactivation.
